tasks.title: Add batch job submission API
evidence: API only supports single job creation per request
No batch endpoint for submitting multiple URLs
Inefficient for users who need to scrape many URLs at once
plan: Implement parallel job creation in manager
Return batch ID and individual job IDs
Update OpenAPI spec with batch endpoints
Add batch submission UI to web

tasks.title: Implement job dependencies and chaining
evidence: Job model has no dependency fields
Cannot create job workflows (crawl -> extract -> analyze)
Each job is independent - no orchestration capability
plan: Add DependsOn []string field to Job model
Add JobChain model for named workflows
Add chain visualization to web UI
Update OpenAPI spec with dependency fields

tasks.title: Add PDF export format
evidence: No PDF generation capability in exporters
Cannot export scraped pages as PDF documents
plan: Add PDF export using headless browser (Chromedp/Playwright)
Support page ranges for crawl results
Add PDF download to web UI

tasks.title: Implement cookie persistence and session management
evidence: HTTP fetcher uses in-memory cookie jar per request
No persistent cookie sessions across jobs
Must re-login for every scrape of authenticated sites
plan: Add SessionStore to auth vault for cookie persistence
Add SessionID field to Request and RenderProfile
Implement cookie jar serialization to JSON
Support session refresh with refresh tokens
Update OpenAPI spec with session options

tasks.title: Add adaptive rate limiting based on server response
evidence: Rate limiter uses fixed QPS - no adaptation
Retry-After header is read but not used for throttling
No backoff based on 429 responses or server load
plan: Add adaptive rate limiting mode to limiter
Monitor 429 responses and adjust QPS downward
Gradually increase rate on successful requests

tasks.title: Implement optional robots.txt compliance
evidence: AGENTS.md explicitly states 'Robots.txt: Ignored by design'
No robots.txt parsing or checking in codebase
Some users need polite crawling for compliance
plan: Implement user-agent matching and rule evaluation
Add CrawlDelay support for rate limiting
Cache robots.txt per host to avoid repeated fetches
Log when URLs are skipped due to robots.txt
